name: Do I need a lawyer to sue over AI referral gone wrong in LA?
description: Yes, mandatory for success due to complexities in CA.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer to sue over AI referral gone wrong in LA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, mandatory for success due to complexities in CA.
acceptedAnswer.description: Strongly recommended; malpractice cases are complex with procedural hurdles. California 'certificate of merit' requires attorney review. Key factors: (1) Technical AI evidence; (2) Expert witnesses needed; (3) Discovery battles. Self-rep risks dismissal. Find a tech-savvy malpractice specialist.
